Title: Cart BOPIS Modal - Select Button Still Present (Regression)
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Items in cart; BOPIS modal opened from cart
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] add BOPIS-eligible product to cart
[ACT] click 'Pickup' radio button
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] cart BOPIS modal opens
[ACT] click on a location in list
[WAIT] location info card opens
[ASSERT] 'Select' button IS present in location info card
[ACT] click 'Select' button
[WAIT] location selected and modal closes
[ASSERT] selected location shown in cart
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Select' button visible in location info card in cart BOPIS modal
[STATE] clicking 'Select' confirms the location and closes the modal
[DOM] selected pickup location shown in cart summary
[STATE] cart BOPIS modal NOT broken by VCST-4584 product page changes
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty for selectPickupLocation
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors in cart BOPIS modal
Failure_Signals: 'Select' button missing in cart BOPIS modal (regression from VCST-4584 changes); Cart BOPIS modal behaves like product page view-only modal
Cleanup: Clear pickup location or remove items from cart

[ASSERT] only 'Shipping' or 'Delivery' available
[ACT] inspect DOM for any hidden pickup elements
Assertions:

[STATE] no pickup-related DOM elements present (no hidden divs)
[DOM] only Shipping/Delivery option available
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify BOPIS deactivation setting before running storefront test
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors on cart page
Failure_Signals: Pickup option visible despite BOPIS module being deactivated; Hidden pickup DOM elements still rendered
Cleanup: Re-activate BOPIS in store settings admin

Title: Mixed Cart: BOPIS + Delivery-Only Items
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Cart has both BOPIS-eligible and delivery-only products
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] add BOPIS-eligible product to cart
[ACT] add delivery-only product to cart
[WAIT] cart shows both items
[ASSERT] BOPIS item has Pickup toggle option
[ASSERT] delivery-only item shows Shipping only (no Pickup toggle)
[ACT] select Pickup for BOPIS-eligible item
[ACT] confirm pickup location
[ACT] verify delivery-only item still shows Shipping method
[ASSERT] cart totals show $0 shipping on pickup item + shipping cost on delivery item
[ACT] proceed to checkout
[ASSERT] checkout summary shows both fulfillment methods
Assertions:
[STATE] BOPIS item shows Pickup toggle; delivery-only item shows Shipping only
[STATE] delivery method selectors are independent per item
[MATH] cart total = BOPIS subtotal + delivery item subtotal + shipping cost (delivery only) + tax
[DOM] checkout summary shows both Pickup and Shipping fulfillment methods
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty for selectPickupLocation
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors with mixed cart
[NETWORK] cart API reflects separate delivery methods per line item
Failure_Signals: Pickup toggle visible on delivery-only item; Mixed cart shows single delivery method for all items; Cart totals incorrect with split fulfillment
Cleanup: Clear pickup location or remove items from cart

Title: Search with Special Characters (Apostrophe + Ampersand)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
PickPoints modal open; Special character queries are environment-agnostic nonsense/synthetic inputs not tied to real location names
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] type "O'Brien's" in search field (apostrophe-containing name — synthetic test input)
[WAIT] results update (results or no-results state acceptable; crash is not)
[ASSERT] application does not crash or produce a JS error on apostrophe input
[ASSERT] results or empty-state message shown correctly
[ACT] clear search field
[ACT] type 'Arts & Crafts' in search field (ampersand-containing name — synthetic test input)
[WAIT] results update
[ASSERT] application does not crash or produce a JS error on ampersand input
[ASSERT] search API does not return 4xx/5xx for either special character query
Assertions:
[STATE] apostrophe input handled without crash or API error
[STATE] ampersand input handled without crash or API error
[STATE] special characters properly escaped in search API calls — no injection or encoding errors
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors on special character search
[NETWORK] search API does not return 4xx/5xx for apostrophe or ampersand queries
Failure_Signals: Application error or crash on apostrophe input; 4xx/5xx API response for special character queries; XSS or injection behavior triggered

Title: Search with Whitespace Only

[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
PickPoints modal open
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] type only spaces (3-5 spaces) in search field
[ACT] submit or trigger search
[WAIT] results update
[ASSERT] all pickup locations restored (whitespace-only treated as empty)
[ASSERT] search field trims whitespace automatically
Assertions:
[STATE] whitespace-only search treated as empty — all locations restored
[STATE] search field trims whitespace automatically
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors on whitespace-only search
[NETWORK] search API not called or called with empty string for whitespace-only input
Failure_Signals: Whitespace-only search returns no results; Application error on whitespace-only search

Title: Multi-Filter: Country + State + City + Search (4 Levels)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
PickPoints modal open; Locations in multiple countries/states/cities configured; ADDR_NY alias resolves to a city with seeded pickup locations
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] select Country filter: USA
[ACT] select State filter: @td(ADDR_NY.state)
[ACT] select City filter: @td(ADDR_NY.city)
[ACT] type 'store' in search field (partial generic name term expected to match at least one seeded BOPIS location)
[WAIT] combined 4-level filter results shown
[ASSERT] only @td(ADDR_NY.city) locations matching the search term shown
[ASSERT] all four filter chips visible
Assertions:
[STATE] all four filter levels (Country + State + City + Search) combine with AND logic
[STATE] only @td(ADDR_NY.city) locations matching search term shown
[DOM] all four filter chips visible simultaneously with resolved filter values
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors with 4-level combined filter
[NETWORK] filtered API response returns only matching locations
Failure_Signals: Multi-level filters not combining with AND; Incorrect results at 4-level combination; Filter chips missing for some levels

[ASSERT] all filter chips still visible and removable
[ASSERT] 'RESET SEARCH' button or equivalent available

[DOM] all applied filter chips still visible and individually removable
[DOM] reset/clear button available to restore state
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors when multi-filter yields no results
Failure_Signals: Application crash or blank state with no message when multi-filter yields no results; Filter chips not removable in no-results state; Reset button absent

Title: Deactivated Location While Confirmed in Cart
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Pickup location confirmed in cart; Admin access available
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] confirm a pickup location in cart
[WAIT] pickup location shown in cart
[ADMIN] navigate to Admin and deactivate the confirmed pickup location (Active=OFF)
[WAIT] deactivation saved in Admin
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart reloads
[ACT] attempt to proceed to checkout
[ASSERT] checkout detects invalid pickup selection
[ASSERT] user prompted to re-select a pickup location
[ASSERT] order NOT placed with deactivated location
Assertions:
[STATE] checkout detects that previously confirmed pickup location is now deactivated
[DOM] user prompted to re-select a valid pickup location
[STATE] order cannot be placed with a deactivated pickup location
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify location deactivated before returning to storefront
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors when invalid pickup location detected
Failure_Signals: Order placed with deactivated pickup location; No prompt shown when confirmed location is deactivated; Checkout does not revalidate pickup location

Title: Org User Pickup Isolation
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User has access to Org A and Org B; Org A cart has items and confirmed pickup location; USER_MULTI_ORG alias (USR-014) member of ORG-001 + ORG-002 — if not seeded use ACME_BUYER (USR-002) with access to ACME org
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[WAIT] sign-in page loads
[FILL] Email field: @td(ACME_BUYER.email)
[FILL] Password field: @td(ACME_BUYER.password)
[CLICK] 'Sign In' button
[WAIT] redirect to account or storefront homepage; account menu visible indicating authenticated state
[ACT] switch organization context to Org A (first org)
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] confirm a pickup location in Org A cart
[WAIT] pickup location shown in Org A cart
[ACT] switch organization context to Org B (second org)
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Org B cart loads
[ASSERT] Org A pickup selection NOT visible in Org B cart
[ASSERT] Org B cart is in clean state (no pickup location from Org A)
Assertions:
[STATE] Org A pickup location not visible in Org B cart
[STATE] clean cart state for Org B — no cross-org data leakage
[STATE] pickup location isolation enforced per org
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] verify no cross-org cart data in cart API response for Org B
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during sign-in or org context switch
Failure_Signals: Org A pickup location shown in Org B cart (cross-org data leak); Cart state not isolated between orgs; Sign-in redirect fails or account menu not visible after login
Cleanup: Clear any pickup selections; navigate away

Title: Cross-Layer: Cart API Shows $0 Shipping
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Pickup selected and location confirmed in cart; DevTools Network tab accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] open browser DevTools Network tab
[ACT] confirm a pickup location in cart
[WAIT] cart API response observable in Network tab
[ACT] find cart API response (e.g., GraphQL cart query or REST cart endpoint)
[ASSERT] shipments[].price = 0 in cart API response
[ASSERT] total = subtotal + taxTotal (no shipping component)
[ASSERT] storefront display of $0.00 shipping consistent with API response
Assertions:
[NETWORK] cart API response shipments[].price = 0 after pickup confirmed
[MATH] total = subtotal + taxTotal in API response — no shipping component
[STATE] API response consistent with storefront display of $0 shipping
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty for selectPickupLocation
[NETWORK] cart API shipments[].price = 0 verified in Network tab
[ADMIN] if order placed, verify stored order has $0 shipping in Admin
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during cart load after pickup confirmed
Failure_Signals: Cart API shipments[].price > 0 despite pickup confirmed; Total in API includes shipping; Storefront display inconsistent with API response
Cleanup: Clear pickup location or remove items from cart

[PRE:RESET_CART]

[ASSERT] dropdown remains open after second selection
[ACT] click third country checkbox using mouse
[WAIT] checkbox checked
[ASSERT] dropdown remains open after third selection

Title: All Filter Checkboxes Clickable — No Pointer Interception
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
PickPoints modal open; Locations in multiple countries/states/cities configured; VCST-4775 regression guard
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] open Country filter dropdown
[ACT] click EACH country checkbox one by one using real mouse clicks (not JavaScript)
[ASSERT] every country checkbox responds to mouse click
[ACT] close Country dropdown
[ACT] select Country: USA
[ACT] open State filter dropdown
[ACT] click EACH state checkbox one by one using real mouse clicks
[ASSERT] every state checkbox responds to mouse click
[ACT] close State dropdown
[ACT] open City filter dropdown
[ACT] click EACH city checkbox one by one using real mouse clicks
[ASSERT] every city checkbox responds to mouse click
[ASSERT] no click intercepted by underlying vc-radio-button__input elements in any filter
Assertions:
[DOM] every checkbox in Country, State, and City filters toggles on mouse click — no unresponsive items
[STATE] selected count matches clicked count for each filter
[DOM] no pointer-events interception from underlying vc-radio-button__input elements (z-index isolation correct)
[DOM] filter chips appear correctly for all selected items across all filters
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during checkbox interactions
[NETWORK] no failed requests during multi-select
Failure_Signals: Some checkboxes unresponsive to mouse click in any filter (Country, State, or City); Click lands on underlying radio button instead of checkbox (z-index/pointer-events bug); Fewer chips than expected after clicking all checkboxes

Title: Select All Countries Shows Complete Location List
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
PickPoints modal open; Locations in multiple countries configured
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] note total number of locations displayed (unfiltered count)
[ACT] open Country filter dropdown
[ACT] select ALL countries one by one
[WAIT] filter applied with all countries selected
[ASSERT] location count with all countries selected equals unfiltered count
[ASSERT] all locations visible in the list (no missing locations)
[ACT] reset all filters
[WAIT] filters cleared
[ASSERT] location count matches the pre-filter count
Assertions:
[STATE] selecting all countries produces same result count as no filter applied (logical equivalence)
[STATE] no locations missing when all countries selected vs unfiltered
[DOM] location list identical between all-selected and unfiltered states
